name: Hearty Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: Gouda cheese round in red wax
Room temperature beef, smoked sliced, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully slice through the wax and Gouda cheese to within 1 inch of the bottom, forming eight pie-shaped wedges.
2. Fold the wax back to expose the cheese; remove the cheese from the wax.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat the cheese until creamy.
4. Add the finely chopped smoked beef, sour cream, sweet pickle relish, and horseradish; mix well.
5. Spoon the mixture into the prepared wax shell.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
7. Serve with apple slices or crackers.
Yield: 1-1/2 cups
